judge.reason: The primary purpose of btrfs_quota_disable is to disable the quota subsystem (clear flags, flush reservations, start a transaction, free qgroup config, clean quota tree, delete root, free tree block). The only refcount operation is a single btrfs_put_root call at the end, which is an incidental cleanup step, not the main purpose. The function contains extensive non-refcount business logic.
